{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032320213214DA6FB6316977B2536F"}"},"total":1961},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7307482190139507465","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是我第1次看到，柱子认为保定白寡妇是好妈的1本！本来也就是，在后世来的穿越者眼里，老爸找个后妈很正常，双方都分开两地了，又没有什么特别的厉害冲突，完全可以和平相处！挺特别的，先看看吧，好看再打高分。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1701406685,"group_id":"7237397964191173647","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"大道万千，真，在你一言！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9leidmnp6fE4BSvtI9VtT8=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1aa932d61ebe45758c3316a5c579b6a4~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789357&x-signature=2fIRqX33lOpFRWYWI3L7VXWtknw%3D","user_id":"106002973732284","user_name":"素喂平僧"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"106002973732284","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1655592961,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7237397964191173647","book_info":{"abstract":"跟傻柱同名同姓的何雨柱因为吐槽四合院剧情，被系统选中，进入了四合院剧情所在的空间，成为了傻柱。不过系统还算是有心，没有把何雨柱丢到剧情开始的时候，而是把何雨柱丢到了何大清跟白寡妇跑路前。
